name: revit_find_columns_near_walls
description: Ray-traces from walls to find nearby structural columns and returns their element ids.

wall_ids.description: Wall element ids to check; omit to scan all walls

view_id.description: 3D view id for ReferenceIntersector (defaults to view named {3D})

search_distance_feet.description: Maximum proximity along ray for column hits (default 2 for curved walls)

notes: Returns map of wall_id to column_ids; skip selection.SetElementIds for MCP.
